free_text: Isomer ratios and average angular moments for
products of photofission of 238U and 237 Np.
Isomer ratios and mean angular momenta are obtained
both  for photofission products of  237Np, 238U and
The samples of thin aluminium plates covered by 237Np
The technique of  gamma-ray spectrometry for isomeric
The isomer  ratios  for   fission   fragments   84Br,
gamma-quanta  with  end-point  energy of 16 MeV from
the  microtron  M-30  were  experimentally obtained.
Average  angular  momenta   of   nuclei  of  fission
products were calculated using the code EMPIRE II.
Gamma-lines energy  and relative gamma-intensity data
